# RAPath India

> India CDSCO Medical Device Regulatory Reference

Plain English reference for India CDSCO medical device regulation — registration, classification, Medical Devices Rules 2017, and post-market obligations.

RAPath is an independent open-source project providing plain English navigation aids for medical device regulatory requirements. Content is written with AI assistance and derived from publicly available official sources only. Always verify against official regulatory sources before making any regulatory decisions. Not legal or regulatory advice.

## Sections

- [Start Here](https://rapath.org/in/start-here/what-is-a-medical-device)
- [Pre-Market](https://rapath.org/in/pre-market/classification)
- [Post-Market](https://rapath.org/in/post-market/overview)
- [Legislation](https://rapath.org/in/legislation/medical-devices-rules-2017)
- [What's New](https://rapath.org/in/whats-new/regulatory-changes)

## Official Sources

- [CDSCO — Medical Devices](https://cdsco.gov.in/opencms/opencms/en/Medical-Device-Diagnostics/)
- [Medical Devices Rules 2017](https://cdsco.gov.in/opencms/export/sites/CDSCO_WEB/Pdf-documents/medical-device/Medical-Devices-Rules-2017-Notified.pdf)
- [Drugs and Cosmetics Act 1940](https://cdsco.gov.in/opencms/opencms/en/Acts-Rules/Acts/)
- [SUGAM Portal (Registration)](https://sugam.gov.in/)
